name: corvin-voice-local
description: CorvinOS — local marketplace bundling voice (TTS + bridges), cowork (per-chat agent personas), forge (runtime tool generation), and skill-forge (runtime skill generation).

plugins.name: voice
plugins.description: Voice mode for Claude Code: reads assistant replies aloud (TTS) with auto language detection (de/en) and optional summarization. Also provides the WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord / Slack / Email bridges that funnel inbound messages into a Claude subprocess.

plugins.name: cowork
plugins.description: Multi-Persona-Layer for Claude Code. Per-chat agent roles (Coder, Browser, Inbox, Research, ...) — each with its own tools, MCP servers, and system prompt. Optional, on top of voice or standalone.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Runtime tool generation: chat-pinned personas can register and execute schema-bound tools, sandboxed via bubblewrap + rlimits, hash-chain audited, with task/session/project/user scope routing.

plugins.name: skill-forge
plugins.description: Runtime skill generation: chat-pinned personas can create Markdown skills with front-matter and prompt-inject them into sub-agents. Lint-gated, hash-chain audited, auto-purges ungraded skills after 7 days.
